stage_progress.purpose: Bring every passing low-effort control and the only non-low matrix frontier arm to three observations.
Raise the only reliable WBD-005 low-effort route from three to six observations.
Bring the fastest higher-effort Sol WBD-005 route to three observations as a fallback candidate.
Raise the near-tied WBD-003 latency and token leaders from three to five observations.
Raise the reliability-first WBD-005 Sol/medium route from three to six observations.
Bring Sol/high to three observations as an independent WBD-005 reliability fallback.
Apply the predeclared clean-screen rule and raise WBD-005 Sol/high from three to five observations.
Raise all three WBD-004 low-effort runtime/token frontier routes from three to five observations.
Raise the WBD-002 Luna/low speed and Sol/low token routes from three to five observations.
Raise the dominant WBD-001 Terra/low route from three to five observations.
Give each selected runtime primary and token alternate a sixth observation that can promote 6/6 routes to high confidence.
Screen the fastest and lower-token passing Luna WBD-005 higher-effort arms as model-diverse fallbacks after every sampled Sol effort failed at least once.
Raise the only clean model-diverse WBD-005 fallback screen from three to five observations for qualification.

qualification_rule: Confidence records the latest attained observation milestone even when a later adaptive extension is pending; plan completion is reported separately. High-confidence requires n>=6 and an unrounded full-quality Wilson-95 lower bound >=0.60; qualified requires n>=5 and a lower bound >=0.55; provisional requires n>=3 and a lower bound >=0.40. The Pareto set uses the highest available qualified tier and all-attempt retry-adjusted time/tokens.
retry_adjustment: The smoothed success probability is (full_quality_passes+1)/(attempts+2). Expected time or tokens per full-quality success is the all-attempt mean divided by that probability. This is a planning estimate, not a monetary price or guarantee.
selection_cautions: Wilson intervals are descriptive and are not adjusted for adaptive route selection.
Observed ranges report latency/token dispersion; the small samples do not support stable tail estimates.
Effective tokens exclude cached input and are a proxy, not billed monetary cost.

totals.monetary_cost_note: No frozen price table or billed-cost field is available; effective tokens are the cost proxy.
